masked_case_json.world_change: a design-tooling company exposed to ai demand beats revenue and eps and raises full-year targets after a major acquisition. the market still has reason to avoid the long because acquired revenue, integration cost, and restructuring can obscure whether organic growth and synergies are arriving fast enough.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: Synopsys Q2 FY2026. Primary source: company earnings release. Correct behavior is no_trade if the model cannot separate organic growth from acquisition contribution and integration/restructuring overhang. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
